aiCommentEN: Market is sleeping, hearts are still awake
aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
比特币短期走势呈现震荡状态。
【关键位置】
当前支撑位：65,000 美元，阻力位：70,000 美元。
【走势推演】
预计短期内将围绕支撑位和阻力位波动。
【一句提醒】
注意风险，密切关注市场变化。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin's short-term trend is fluctuating.
[Key Drivers]
Current support level: $65,000, resistance level: $70,000.
[Outlook]
It is expected to fluctuate around the support and resistance levels in the short term.
[Reminder]
Be aware of the risks and closely monitor market changes.
